title: HPE Aruba Networking simplifies IT operations with AIOps-driven cloud management and new network-as-a-service capabilities available on HPE GreenLake
text: LAS VEGAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today introduced product innovations to help enterprise IT teams simplify network management processes and improve operational agility with the next generation of HPE Aruba Networking Central, a cloud-native network management solution. HPE Aruba Networking also announced Network-as-a-service (NaaS) capabilities for customers and channel partners to acquire, deploy, and manage on the HPE GreenLake platform with a monthly subscri.

title: 4 Stocks to Watch in a Challenging Technology Solutions Industry
text: Despite bearing the brunt of lingering supply chain constraints, industry players like IBM, HPE, AGYS and PAR are gaining from increased demand for integrated solutions and the growing adoption of the multi-cloud model.

title: Hewlett Packard Pathfinder Makes Strategic Investment in API Protection Leader Cequence Security
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cequence Security, the leading provider of Unified API Protection (UAP), today announced Hewlett Packard Pathfinder, the venture capital program of Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), has made a strategic investment in the company. Hewlett Packard Pathfinder invests in category-leading start-ups, creates solutions combining portfolio companies' technology with HPE products, and architects joint go-to-market programs.

title: HPE to Modernize DISA's Wireless Networks With Aruba Solutions
text: The deployment of HPE's Aruba Wi-Fi 6 APs and Networking ClearPass solutions is likely to provide DISA employees, mission partners and guests with secure, high-performance connectivity.

title: Defense Information Systems Agency (DISA) Modernizes Wireless Networks and Access Management, Across All Classification Levels, With HPE Aruba Networking Infrastructure
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that the Defense Information Systems Agency (DISA), a combat support agency of the United State Department of Defense (DoD) headquartered in Fort Meade, MD, is modernizing and securing multi-class wireless networks with HPE Aruba Networking ESP (Edge Services Platform) solutions.

title: Hewlett Packard (HPE) Expands Alletra Portfolio Services
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) to offer new data services leveraging HPE Alletra Storage MP solution to its customers, thus reducing costs and complexities, through HPE GreenLake platform.

title: HPE Transforms Data Lifecycle Management With Expanded HPE Alletra Portfolio With New File, Block and Data Protection Services
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced new file, block, disaster and backup recovery data services designed to help customers eliminate data silos, reduce cost and complexity, and improve performance. The new file storage data services deliver scale-out, enterprise-grade performance for data-intensive workloads, and the expanded block services provide mission-critical storage with mid-range economics.
